holdings.infoBox: PTNT is an equity ETF with a total of 32 individual holdings. The top holdings are McDonald's stock at 7.68%, Arm Holdings at 7.63%, QUALCOMM at 7.28%, Netflix at 5.78%, and International Business Machines at 5.22%.

overview.description: The Corgi IP Licensing & Royalties ETF (PTNT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks capital appreciation through a portfolio of companiesinvolved in intellectual property (IP) monetization, generating significant revenue through licensing, royalties, franchise fees, and other IP-based income streams. PTNT was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
